description: Capability for the main window. The engine sidecar is spawned from Rust via tokio::process (engine_bridge.rs), not via plugin-shell webview IPC, so no shell:allow-spawn grant is needed here — capabilities only gate webview->plugin calls. `dialog:allow-open` is the Project screen's directory picker (`@tauri-apps/plugin-dialog`'s `open({directory: true})`, wired in lib.rs via `tauri_plugin_dialog::init()`) — the only plugin-shell-style webview->plugin call this app makes.
